title: AI Engineering Foundations
subtitle: For college engineers · From theory to shipped projects
description: A 10-day intensive program for engineering students who want deep intuition for AI systems, hands-on API projects, and portfolio-ready work for internships and interviews.

days.title: LLMs, Tokens & Transformers
days.description: Build strong mental models for how large language models work - tokens, attention, and prediction - without getting lost in math.

days.title: APIs, Embeddings & Vector Basics
days.description: Understand the building blocks of modern AI applications - APIs, vector stores, and how data flows through AI systems.

days.title: Prompt Engineering & Tool Use
days.description: Master structured prompting, chain-of-thought, and function calling - the skills that separate hobbyists from engineers.

days.title: RAG Architecture
days.description: Design and implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines - the most common pattern in production AI apps.

days.title: Fine-Tuning vs Prompting
days.description: Learn when to prompt, when to fine-tune, and when to use both - with clear decision frameworks.

days.title: Building with LLM APIs
days.description: Hands-on session building a real application using LLM APIs - from design to working prototype.

days.title: Agents & Workflows
days.description: Explore multi-step AI agents, workflow orchestration, and when agentic patterns add value vs complexity.

days.title: System Design for AI Apps
days.description: Apply system design mental models to AI-powered applications - scalability, reliability, and cost at scale.

days.title: Portfolio Project Sprint
days.description: Dedicated build day to polish your portfolio project with mentor feedback and code review.

days.title: Demo Day & Interview Prep
days.description: Present your project, practice technical interview questions, and get a personalized career roadmap.
